text: ASHLAND PARKS AND RECREATION CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth camps. 1195 E Main Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Most activities are for children ages 6-17 Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-1pm Camps: Varies by camp Email (541) 488-5340 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 488-5340 Main phone Main phone (541) 488-5340 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Ashland SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-1pm Services: Camps Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
